name: Alaska Seafood Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the pizza dough evenly on a pizza pan.
2. Arrange the crab meat, shrimp, pineapple, mushrooms, black olives, and diced green pepper on top of the dough.
3. Sprinkle the mozzarella and white cheddar cheeses over the toppings.
4. Place the pizza in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Note: This recipe does not include attribution lines, metadata, or notes that aren't part of the recipe.
